name: LaFayette Acquisition Corp.
summary: Overview LaFayette Acquisition Corp. (the Company, we, our) is a Cayman Islands exempted company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. We may pursue a business combination with a target in any industry or geographic region that we believe can benefit from the expertise and capabilities of our management team.
